mapper.sql: p.id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.category_id, p.seller_id, p.status, p.create_time, c.name AS category_name, u.username AS seller_name, (SELECT image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pi.id LIMIT 1) AS main_image_url
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.seller_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.seller_id = u.id WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(title, description, price, category_id, seller_id, status, create_time) VALUES(#{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{sellerId}, #{status}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
